info.title: Meal Direct API
info.description: Stable REST API for Meal Direct web and future mobile clients.

idempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
idempotencyKey.description: Required for important mutations such as order creation and payments.

requestId.name: x-request-id
requestId.description: Optional caller-provided request ID. The API echoes or generates one.

operationsToken.description: Internal operations token. Temporary until Super Admin JWT/RBAC is implemented.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role assigned to the user.

uploadUrl.description: Signed URL the client PUTs the binary to.

key.description: Owner-scoped Storage key to confirm afterwards.

tokenRefreshRequired.description: Always true: the client must refresh its session so the new vendor_id appears in the JWT.

serviceFeeKobo.description: Per-vendor takeaway/packaging fee in kobo. Null clears to the global default; may not exceed the campus ceiling.

key.description: Owner-scoped Storage key returned by the matching upload-url endpoint.

accountNumber.description: Full account number for masking before storage.

countsTowardSpoonLimit.description: When true, this item contributes to takeaway packaging rules and fees.

requiresSoup.description: When true, ordering this item requires picking one of the vendor's soups.
When true, ordering this item requires the customer to pick one of the vendor's active soups.

code.description: Code the customer gives to the rider after receiving the order.

instruction.description: Customer-facing instruction to show with the delivery code.

customerDisplayName.description: Customer display name. Present only on vendor/admin/rider order views.

customerPhone.description: Customer phone number. Present only on vendor/admin/rider order views.

roomNumber.description: Hostel room number when the delivery location is a hostel.

largeOrderSurchargeKobo.description: Large-order surcharge (1.5% + ₦100) charged on this order. Included in totalKobo.

deliveryCode.description: Delivery hand-off code to read to the rider after receiving the order.

deliveryHandoff.description: Customer-facing code + instruction payload for delivery hand-off.

batchId.description: Delivery batch this order belongs to, when batched. Powers the batch chat.

soupOptionId.description: The chosen soup option id when the item required a soup; null otherwise.

soupName.description: Display name of the chosen soup; null when no soup was required.

customerDisplayName.description: Customer display name. Present only on vendor/admin/rider order views.

customerPhone.description: Customer phone number. Present only on vendor/admin/rider order views.

roomNumber.description: Hostel room number when the delivery location is a hostel.

largeOrderSurchargeKobo.description: Large-order surcharge (1.5% + ₦100) charged on this order. Included in totalKobo.

deliveryCode.description: Delivery hand-off code to read to the rider after receiving the order.

deliveryHandoff.description: Customer-facing code + instruction payload for delivery hand-off.

batchId.description: Delivery batch this order belongs to, when batched. Powers the batch chat.

code.description: Immutable lowercase code, e.g. spoon, piece, plate.

countsTowardSpoonLimit.description: When true, quantities count toward the three-spoon takeaway package limit.

triggersTakeawayFee.description: When true, an order containing this item pulls the flat takeaway/service fee, independent of the spoon-limit cap.

maxQuantity.description: Maximum quantity per order line for this unit type; null means unlimited.

soupOptions.description: The vendor's active soups; rendered as the picker for items requiring a soup.

countsTowardSpoonLimit.description: When true, this item contributes to takeaway packaging rules and fees.

requiresSoup.description: When true, the customer must pick one of the vendor's soups for this item.

customization.description: Per-item customization object (e.g. spoonsCount, customFoodType, customProtein, customFoodSelections, drinks). Stored and returned verbatim.

soupOptionId.description: Chosen soup option id (from the vendor's soup list). Required when the menu item requires a soup.

roomNumber.description: Hostel room number. Required when the selected delivery location is a hostel.

acceptLargeOrderSurcharge.description: Set true to acknowledge and accept the large-order surcharge (1.5% + ₦100) required for order totals above the standard ₦2490 cap. Orders over the cap are rejected unless this is true.

countsTowardSpoonLimit.description: When true, this line contributes to takeaway packaging rules and fees.

triggersTakeawayFee.description: When true, this line pulls the flat takeaway/service fee (independent of the spoon-limit cap).

largeOrderSurchargeKobo.description: Large-order surcharge (1.5% + ₦100) already included in totalKobo. Zero when the order does not exceed the standard cap.

exceedsStandardCap.description: True when the total exceeds the standard ₦2490 cap. Show the surcharge notice and require acceptLargeOrderSurcharge on create.

deliveryHandoff.description: Immediate pop-up payload for the customer after order creation.

tokenRefreshRequired.description: The client must refresh its session to receive the rider_id claim.

bankCode.description: Paystack bank code, required to provision the transfer recipient.

accountNumber.description: Full account number used to provision the recipient; only a mask is stored.

customerDisplayName.description: Customer display name. Present only on vendor/admin/rider order views.

customerPhone.description: Customer phone number. Present only on vendor/admin/rider order views.

roomNumber.description: Hostel room number when the delivery location is a hostel.

largeOrderSurchargeKobo.description: Large-order surcharge (1.5% + ₦100) charged on this order. Included in totalKobo.

deliveryCode.description: Delivery hand-off code to read to the rider after receiving the order.

deliveryHandoff.description: Customer-facing code + instruction payload for delivery hand-off.

batchId.description: Delivery batch this order belongs to, when batched. Powers the batch chat.

serviceFeeKobo.description: Takeaway/packaging service fee reimbursed to the vendor.
Takeaway/packaging service fee reimbursed to the vendor.

token.description: FCM device/registration token issued by the mobile or web client.

platform.description: Client platform that issued the token.

hasMore.description: True when another page is available.

limit.description: Limit applied to the current page.

nextCursor.description: Cursor to request the next page.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

dateFrom.description: Inclusive ISO-8601 lower bound for date filtering.

dateTo.description: Inclusive ISO-8601 upper bound for date filtering.

requestId.description: Request identifier for support and log correlation.

amountCents.description: Amount in the smallest currency unit.

sort.description: Sort expression in field:direction form, or -field for descending.
